title: Tecnock RC Car Remote Control Car for Kids, 1:18 High Speed 20 KM/H 2WD RC Buggy, 2.4GHz Off Road Racing with Rechargeable Batteries, Toys Gift for Boys and Girls
features: 【Batteries for 50 Mins Running】 The RC car is packed with rechargeable batteries and a USB charger. It will extend the driving time up to 50 mins, which depends on the operation. The battery is charged via USB, which is fast and convenient. Overcharge protection fully ensures the safety of charging.

【20 KM/H High Speed RC Car】 This 1:18 scale remote control car is equipped with a powerful brushed motor, which can reach a maximum speed of 20 km/h at full speed. Its powerful performance makes this RC car an ideal toy for boys and girls, adults also can get relatively fun for sure.

【High Quality & Durable Racing Car】 The body of the RC car is made of high-quality PET material, which gives the car a strong anti-collision ability. Rubber tires are full of toughness and elasticity, wear-resisting, but also have the effect of shock absorption. These features greatly extend the use time of the car.

【Anti-Interference Remote Control】 The remote control works in the 2.4GHz frequency band, and the longest control distance can reach 100 feet. It can prevent signal interference when multiple racing cars are playing at the same time, so that players can fully experience the fun of multiplayer racing.

【Tecnock, The Perfect Gift for Kids】 This is a perfect gift for boys and girls. If you are looking for an exciting and cool gift, then you will love it. If you are not satisfied with the product or have any questions, Tecnock will strive to provide the best customer service. Experience the fun of racing now!
description: Product Description Durable Rubber Tires Equipped with high-toughness and high-grip tires, this truck can pass all roads, grassy roads, stone roads, and any rough roads. More durable than ordinary tires. Extended Driving Time The high-quality rechargeable batteries will extend the driving time up to 50+ minutes which depends on the operation. Shock Absorber System The four wheels are equipped with shock absorbers, which can absorb the vibration caused by the collision of the wheels and better protect the parts in the car. Powerful Car Motor This powerful motor can bring more power to your car, with a maximum speed of 20km/h. Overcome terrain obstacles and experience the fun of outdoor driving. High Toughness Shell The high-quality PVC shell has the characteristics of abrasion resistance and impact resistance. These characteristics make the car have a longer service life. Accurate Steering Trim The steering of the RC car is sensitive and accurate, and the steering trimming rod at the bottom can trim the steering. Bring you an excellent control experience. What is Included: 1 x RC Car 1 x Transmitter 1 x USB Cable 1 x User Manual 2 x Rechargeable Batteries Specification: Frequency: 2.4GHz Drive system: 2WD Speed: 20+ km/h Remote Distance: > 100 feet Charging Time: about 120 mins Size: 8.7*5.5*3.5 inches (1/18) Playing Time: 2* 25+ mins (Depends on playing operations) Remote Control Battery: 2 x 1.5V AA Batteries (Included) Please Note: 1. To maintain the stability condition of the battery, please remove it from the toy truck and turn off the truck when charging, otherwise, it can damage the battery lifespan. 2. Please control the car according to our user manual to avoid the hurt caused by the inappropriate control.
